en: A SONG. A PSALM OF THE SONS OF KORAH. Great is the LORD and greatly to be praised in the city of our God! His holy mountain,
zh: 在我們 神的城中，在他的聖山上， 耶和華是至大的，應該大受讚美。

en: beautiful in elevation, is the joy of all the earth, Mount Zion, in the far north, the city of the great King.
zh: 在北面的錫安山、大君王的城， 美麗高聳，是全地所喜歡的。

en: Within her citadels God has made himself known as a fortress.
zh: 神在城的堡壘中， 顯明自己是避難所。

en: For behold, the kings assembled; they came on together.
zh: 看哪！列王會合， 一同前進。

en: As soon as they saw it, they were astounded; they were in panic; they took to flight.
zh: 他們一見這城，就驚惶， 慌忙逃跑。

en: Trembling took hold of them there, anguish as of a woman in labor.
zh: 他們在那裡戰慄恐懼； 他們痛苦好像婦人分娩時一樣。

en: By the east wind you shattered the ships of Tarshish.
zh: 你用東風摧毀他施的船隊。

en: As we have heard, so have we seen in the city of the LORD of hosts, in the city of our God, which God will establish forever. Selah
zh: 在萬軍之耶和華的城中， 就是在我們 神的城中， 我們所看見的，正如我們所聽見的： 神必堅立這城，直到永遠。

en: We have thought on your steadfast love, O God, in the midst of your temple.
zh: 神啊！我們在你的殿中， 想念你的慈愛。

en: As your name, O God, so your praise reaches to the ends of the earth. Your right hand is filled with righteousness.
zh: 神啊！你受的讚美， 就像你的名一樣，達到地極； 你的右手滿了公義。

en: Let Mount Zion be glad! Let the daughters of Judah rejoice because of your judgments!
zh: 因你的審判，錫安山應當歡喜， 猶大的居民 應當快樂。

en: Walk about Zion, go around her, number her towers,
zh: 你們要在錫安四處巡行，繞城一周， 數點城樓，

en: consider well her ramparts, go through her citadels, that you may tell the next generation
zh: 細察它的外牆， 巡視它的堡壘， 使你們可以述說給後代的人聽。

en: that this is God, our God forever and ever. He will guide us forever.
zh: 因為這位 神就是我們的 神， 直到永永遠遠； 他必引導我們，直到我們死的時候。
